candidate_check.description: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must not have the telnet package installed.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the telnet package is not installed on Ubuntu 24.04 LTS with the following command: 
 
$ dpkg -l | grep telnetd 

If the telnetd package is installed, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Remove the telnet package from Ubuntu 24.04 LTS with the following command: 
 
$ sudo apt remove telnetd
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must not have the telnet package installed.
